title: Apply to be an aviation ambassador
body: "Aviation ambassadors play an important role in championing the sector, inspiring the next generation of aviation professionals and acting as role models for future aviation workers from all backgrounds.  Read this guidance to find out more about the role and understand how we choose aviation ambassadors.  Criteria for the role  You will need to demonstrate that you will already be working in or involved with the aviation industry.  What you will need to complete the form  To complete the application form, you will need to provide:   a description of your interest in the role personal and contact information employment details support from your employer or educational institution   The application form allows you to save your progress so you can edit your answers before you submit them.  Support  If you have any questions about how to apply or nominate someone, contact: AviationAmbassadors@dft.gov.uk  We cannot respond to enquiries about the progress of an application. "
